# === Legal & Contractual Snapshot (8 universal fields) ===

governingLaw: "State and federal laws of the United States, specifically Washington state law. Stated in Costco's Terms and Conditions of Use."

disputeVenue: "Federal or state courts in Seattle, Washington. Costco requires exclusive jurisdiction and venue there for any dispute arising out of the Site Terms, regardless of where you access the site."

juryTrial: "Not addressed. The Site Terms include no jury trial waiver clause."

arbitration: "Not required. Costco's Terms and Conditions of Use do not include a mandatory arbitration clause or class action waiver. Disputes go to court in Seattle, Washington under Washington state law."

liabilityCap: "Costco's aggregate liability for claims arising out of its site operations is capped at $100. Costco disclaims all implied warranties and broadly excludes indirect, consequential, special, punitive, and exemplary damages to the fullest extent permitted by law."

accountTermination: "Costco may terminate your site license and block future access at any time, without notice, if you violate the Site Terms or Costco's policies. Membership itself may be terminated by Costco at its discretion and without cause, per Member Privileges and Conditions."

privacyHighLevel: "Costco collects account, transaction, browsing, and health-related data (when you use pharmacy or health care services) and uses it to provide services and fulfillment. Costco may share with service providers and may access and use stored communications for lawful purposes, including disclosing to law enforcement. Full details are in Costco's separate Privacy Policy and Consumer Health Data Privacy Notice."

termModification: "Costco reserves the right to modify the Site Terms at any time without notice. Changes are effective on posting; continued use of the site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance. Membership Privileges and Conditions may also change without prior notice."

# === Vendor-wide Watch Out For ===
watchOutFor:
  - headline: "Anything you submit to Costco's site — reviews, photos, ideas — becomes Costco's to use royalty-free, forever."
    detail: "Costco's Terms grant a perpetual, irrevocable, royalty-free, worldwide license to use, copy, modify, adapt, publish, and sublicense any content or ideas you submit through the site. The license has no expiration and no compensation. This applies to product reviews, photo uploads, and any written submissions."
  - headline: "Costco can terminate your membership at its discretion and without cause."
    detail: "The Member Privileges and Conditions state that membership 'may be terminated at Costco's discretion and without cause.' However, the 100% satisfaction guarantee on membership means Costco will refund your membership fee if you cancel for any reason."
